title: Repair policy-routed gateway reachability
prompt: A fixture-driven Bash route simulator reports that the marked outbound flow cannot reach its next-hop, even though the interface is up, its address is correct, and the neighbor is reachable. Diagnose the interface, address, route, neighbor, and policy-rule fixtures. Repair bin/routecause so it proposes and applies the actual missing, more-specific connected route in the table selected by policy routing. `simulate` must make both the outbound and return paths pass, must be idempotent, and must leave every unrelated routing table unchanged. Do not change fixtures or tests.
